notes: Primary dominant brand color; headlines, links, icon strokes. Pantone 2145 C, RGB 0,82,155, CMYK 100,76,6,1.
Primary warm accent. Pantone 137 C, RGB 250,163,27, CMYK 0,42,100,0. Reserved for emphasis; avoid as text on white.
Primary gold. Pantone 7548 C, RGB 255,198,10, CMYK 0,23,100,0. Used for emphasis, rules, logo mark (at 70% transparency).
Gold value used for the arrow glyph in the gradient callout CTA button (note: distinct hex from primary Gold #ffc60a).
Secondary blue. RGB 53,140,203, CMYK 75,35,0,0. Chart dominant color, subhead color in text-heavy callouts.
Secondary deep blue. RGB 0,61,116, CMYK 100,83,29,14. Button fill in gradient callout CTA.
Secondary dark navy. RGB 1,30,69, CMYK 100,89,40,49. Gradient dark end; drop-shadow color at low opacity.
Tertiary sparing accent. RGB 242,106,56, CMYK 0,73,87,0. Never for primary CTAs/headlines/data; avoid in email unless brief calls for it.
Tertiary surface. RGB 230,240,249, CMYK 8,2,0,0. Callout box fill, chart panel fill.
Tertiary warm surface. RGB 254,241,200, CMYK 0,3,24,0. Text-heavy callout box fill.
Body text on light backgrounds. RGB 33,33,33, CMYK 0,0,0,88.
White. RGB 255,255,255, CMYK 0,0,0,0. Text on dark, badge fill, button label, section background.
Neutral gray used for placebo/comparator in charts; no hex specified.
Light gold end of masthead gradient (0C,10M,78Y,0K); lightest end where the logo mark sits.
Light stop color in the CTA SVG shape linear gradient.
Dark stop color in the CTA SVG shape linear gradient (note distinct from Sunshine #faa31b).
